name: oura-ring-mcp-server
description: Query your Oura Ring data — sleep, readiness, activity, heart rate, workouts, and more — via the Oura API v2.
long_description: A Model Context Protocol server for the Oura Ring API v2. Exposes a single consolidated `oura_data` tool covering every Oura `usercollection` endpoint, so you can ask about sleep, readiness, activity, heart rate, stress, workouts, and more from your own Oura data. Read-only; authenticates with a personal access token.

tools.name: oura_data
tools.description: Fetch data from any Oura API v2 usercollection endpoint (sleep, readiness, activity, heart rate, workouts, and more).

sandbox.title: Use Oura sandbox (demo) data
sandbox.description: Query Oura's sandbox demo dataset instead of your real ring data — useful for trying the server out without a physical ring.
